trades.reasoning: Score 100 with RSI 63.6 in the ideal 55-70 bullish zone, confirmed MACD crossover, and volume surge — semiconductor leadership in a risk-on tech rally makes this the strongest quality momentum play today.
Score 100 with RSI 69.0 just below overbought, rising MACD histogram, and 1.5x volume surge — low share price allows a meaningful position with remaining cash.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ +1.1% and S&P +0.9% gives a green light to deploy the remaining $598 in cash across two of the five open slots. NVDA is the highest-conviction pick: score 100, RSI in the sweet spot, and semiconductor leadership on a strong tape. JOBY is a secondary speculative play with equally clean technicals and low enough price to build a real position. All three score-100 names (NVDA, JOBY, HL) have RSI in the healthy 55-70 zone rather than overbought territory, which is the ideal entry profile.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly today in a risk-on session, with the NASDAQ gaining 1.1% and the S&P 500 up 0.9%, as improving sentiment around U.S.-China trade negotiations reduced near-term macro uncertainty. Semiconductor and growth names led the charge, with high-volume breakouts across the screener reflecting institutional participation rather than retail-driven speculation. The synchronized strength across sectors — from tech (NVDA) to industrials to miners — suggests a broad re-rating of risk assets as recession fears ease.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日呈現全面風險偏好格局，那斯達克指數上漲1.1%，標普500指數亦升0.9%。市場情緒受惠於美中貿易談判進展，短期宏觀不確定性有所降低。半導體及成長類股領漲，篩選器中多檔個股出現高成交量突破，顯示為機構資金主導而非散戶炒作。科技（輝達）、工業至礦業板塊同步走強，反映市場正對風險資產進行廣泛重新定價，衰退憂慮逐步消散。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) measures buying and selling pressure on a scale of 0–100. The 55–70 range is the momentum investor's sweet spot: the stock has strong upward pressure (above the neutral 50 line) but isn't yet overbought (above 70), meaning there's still room to run before a mean-reversion pullback becomes likely. Today's top picks — NVDA at RSI 63.6 and JOBY at RSI 69.0 — sit squarely in this zone, which is why they rank higher than higher-RSI stocks like FLEX (95.6) or AMD (85.8) despite similar MACD signals.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 相對強弱指數（RSI）以0至100的數值衡量市場的買賣力道。55至70的區間被視為動能投資者的「最佳入場帶」：股價已突破中性值50，反映強勁買盤；但尚未超過70的超買水平，代表仍有上漲空間，均值回歸的拉回風險也相對較低。今日首選的輝達（RSI 63.6）和JOBY（RSI 69.0）均落在此區間，正因如此，儘管FLEX（RSI 95.6）或AMD（RSI 85.8）的MACD信號同樣強勁，它們的入場評級反而更低。
